invite.needSpace.hint: After that, Octo will continue joining the current group chat automatically.
invite.needSpace.title: Join a Space first
invite.sessionExpiredJoin: Your login has expired. Please log in again to join.
invite.spaceFullCannotJoin: Space is full and cannot be joined.

joinSpace.homeSubtitle: Enter an invite code to join your team
joinSpace.inputInviteSubtitle: Paste an invite code to preview and join the team
joinSpace.inviteInvalidOrExpired: The invite code is invalid or expired.

joinSpace.spaceFullCannotJoin: This Space is full and cannot be joined.
main.empty.title: Select a chat to activate the connection

main.updateAlreadyLatest: You are already on the latest version.
onboarding.actions.installExtensionAria: Install the Octo browser extension and open Chrome Web Store
onboarding.intro.hero.subtitle: Where humans and AI Agents work as one team
onboarding.intro.hero.title: Octo is an AI-native collaboration platform
onboarding.intro.meanings.context.descri: Work context stays protected, traceable, and ready for Agents to act on.
onboarding.intro.meanings.context.title: Context
onboarding.intro.meanings.open.descripti: Open source and self-hostable, so your data stays under your control.
onboarding.intro.meanings.open.title: Open
Humans, AI Agents, and tools coordinate through one collaboration layer.
onboarding.intro.meanings.taste.descript: AI can think and execute; humans bring taste, judgment, and lived context.
onboarding.intro.meanings.taste.title: Taste
onboarding.sections.aiAvatar.description: Learn how a workplace AI Agent can carry your context, judgment criteria, and work style into shared collaboration.
onboarding.sections.aiAvatar.label: AI Agent
onboarding.sections.aiAvatar.nameLabel: Your AI Agent can join mentions and shared work later
onboarding.sections.aiAvatar.previewHint: It appears in @ mentions and works with your context.
onboarding.sections.aiAvatar.title: Understand your AI Agent
onboarding.sections.browserExtension.des: Select useful pages, documents, or customer materials in the browser and pull them into Octo with source context.
onboarding.sections.favorites.descriptio: Channels, subspaces, and AI Agents can all be followed, so important customers, active tasks, and long-running work stay easy to return to.
onboarding.sections.favorites.label: Favorites
onboarding.sections.favorites.title: Keep key work in Favorites
onboarding.sections.groupMd.description: GROUP.md is the shared handbook for a channel: goals, resources, collaboration rules, and Agent instructions live in one place.
onboarding.sections.groupMd.label: GROUP.md
onboarding.sections.groupMd.title: Align teams with GROUP.md
onboarding.sections.smartSummary.descrip: When discussions get long, AI Summary reorganizes conclusions, disagreements, open questions, and next actions. It does not decide for you; it helps humans return to judgment faster.
onboarding.sections.smartSummary.label: AI Summary
onboarding.sections.smartSummary.title: Return to judgment context
onboarding.sections.subspaces.descriptio: Create a subspace for a project, customer, or task. Related messages, materials, judgments, and next actions gather in one durable context.
onboarding.sections.subspaces.label: Subspaces
onboarding.sections.subspaces.title: Move tasks into subspaces
onboarding.sections.webhook.description: CI notices, alerts, GitHub events, and customer-system messages enter the relevant channel through Webhook, becoming visible to both humans and Agents.
onboarding.sections.webhook.label: Webhook
onboarding.sections.webhook.title: Bring events into context
onboarding.sections.workspace.descriptio: Octo keeps familiar direct messages and channels, while turning long-running work into durable context. Channels carry daily collaboration, subspaces hold tasks, GROUP.md records shared rules, and AI Agents help move work forward.
onboarding.sections.workspace.label: Workspace
onboarding.sections.workspace.title: How Octo organizes work
spaceCreate.createFailedRetry: Failed to create. Please try again.
spaceCreate.inviteTip: Space created. Share this link to invite members:
spaceGate.subtitle: Join a team or create a new workspace
